title: HOOK 1 — Postman walks up the bike circle
prompt: Wide shot at @bike-circle in cheerful spring morning. @Postman walks confidently up the asphalt cul-de-sac toward the camera, mailbag swaying at his hip, brown package held in both hands at chest height, friendly smile. Long warm shadows from the trees. Postman: "Almost there! Last delivery of the morning." He whistles a cheerful tune. Camera holds steady, slight push-in.
